panel.title: Ask Sol!
panel.subtitle: Ask Sol anything about your project, your savings, or how solar works in Malaysia.

composer.placeholder: Ask Sol about your roof, your savings, NEM credits...

errors.quotaExhausted: Sol's chatting with a lot of folks today and hit the daily limit. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Sol is taking a quick breather. Please try again shortly.
errors.permissionDenied: Sol isn't configured correctly. Please contact support.
errors.injectionRejected: Hmm, Sol can't process that one. Try rephrasing your question?
errors.networkFailure: Couldn't reach Sol. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Sol hit an unexpected snag. Please try again.
